operations.name: apigee_organizations_apis_list
operations.description: List API proxies in the organization.

operations.name: apigee_organizations_apis_create
operations.description: Import an API proxy bundle (creates a new revision).

operations.name: apigee_organizations_apiproducts_list
operations.description: List API products in the organization.

operations.name: apigee_organizations_apiproducts_create
operations.description: Create an API product bundling proxy operations.

operations.name: apigee_organizations_developers_create
operations.description: Register a developer in the organization.

operations.name: apigee_organizations_developers_apps_create
operations.description: Create a developer app and obtain credentials.

operations.name: apigee_organizations_environments_sharedflows_revisions_deploy
operations.description: Deploy a shared flow revision to an environment.

operations.name: apigee_organizations_environments_sharedflows_revisions_undeploy
operations.description: Undeploy a shared flow revision from an environment.

operations.name: generate_deployment_change_report
operations.description: Preview the impact of deploying an API proxy revision.

operations.name: generate_upload_url_for_apigee_deployment
operations.description: Get a signed URL for uploading an API proxy bundle archive.

operations.name: generate_download_url_for_apigee_environment_deployment
operations.description: Get a signed URL for downloading a deployed proxy bundle.
